parameters.name: search
parameters.value: =search index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" action=BLOCK earliest=-1h latest=now | stats count as total_blocked dc(httpRequest.uri) as unique_uri_count values(httpRequest.uri) as targeted_endpoints values(httpRequest.country) as countries earliest(_time) as first_epoch latest(_time) as last_epoch by httpRequest.clientIp | eval attack_duration=tostring(last_epoch - first_epoch, "duration") | eval first_seen=strftime(first_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC") | eval last_seen=strftime(last_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC") | sort -total_blocked | head 1

parameters.body:
={
  "title": "🚨 Incident — WAF Attack from {{ $json.attackerIp }} | {{ $json.stateTime.slice(0,10) }}",
  "text": "# Security Incident Report

> **Status:** 🔴 ACTIVE — Awaiting Admin Decision

---

## Incident Summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Alarm** | `{{ $json.alarmName }}` |
| **Triggered** | {{ $json.stateTime }} |
| **WAF Rule** | {{ $json.ruleName }} |
| **Web ACL** | {{ $json.webAclName }} |
| **AWS Account** | {{ $json.accountId }} |
| **Region** | {{ $json.awsRegion }} |

**Trigger reason:** {{ $json.stateReason }}

---

## Attacker Profile *(via Splunk)*

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source IP** | `{{ $json.attackerIp }}` |
| **Total Blocked Requests** | {{ $json.totalBlocked }} |
| **Unique Endpoints Hit** | {{ $json.uniqueUriCount }} |
| **Targeted Paths** | `{{ $json.targetedEndpoints.join(', ') }}` |
| **Country** | {{ $json.countries.join(', ') }} |
| **First Seen** | {{ $json.firstSeen }} |
| **Last Seen** | {{ $json.lastSeen }} |
| **Attack Duration** | {{ $json.attackDuration }} |

---

## Evidence Links

- 🔍 [Splunk Dashboard — Live]({{ $vars.SPLUNK_DASHBOARD_URL }})
- 🔍 [Filter by attacker IP]({{ $vars.SPLUNK_URL.replace('8089','8000') }}/en-US/app/search/search?q=index%3Ddevsecops_security+httpRequest.clientIp%3D%22{{ $json.attackerIp }}%22)

---

## Response

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Analyst** | Pending |
| **Action Taken** | Pending |
| **Resolution Time** | Pending |

---

*Auto-generated by n8n SOC Orchestration Workflow*",
  "collectionId": "{{ $vars.OUTLINE_COLLECTION_ID }}",
  "publish": true
}

parameters.jsCode:
// Build the Human-in-the-Loop email. // $execution.resumeUrl is the unique URL for THIS workflow execution. // Appending ?action=block / ?action=ignore routes the decision back to the workflow. const ctx = $input.first().json; const outlineDoc = $('Create Outline Incident Report').first().json.data; const resumeBase = $execution.resumeUrl; const blockUrl = `${resumeBase}?action=block`; const ignoreUrl = `${resumeBase}?action=ignore`; const outlineUrl = outlineDoc?.url ?? '#'; const docId = outlineDoc?.id ?? ''; const endpointList = (ctx.targetedEndpoints ?? []).map(e => `
  • ${e}
    • `).join(''); const html = `

    🚨 WAF Layer 7 Attack Detected

    CloudWatch Alarm: ${ctx.alarmName}

    🕵 Attacker Profile

    Source IP ${ctx.attackerIp}
    Blocked Requests ${ctx.totalBlocked}
    Attack Duration ${ctx.attackDuration}
    Targeted Endpoints
      ${endpointList}
    Country ${(ctx.countries ?? []).join(', ')}
    Triggered At ${ctx.stateTime}

    📋 Evidence

    📄 View Outline Incident Report

    🔍 View Splunk SOC Dashboard

    🛎 Admin Action Required

    Review the evidence, then choose an action.
    This link expires when the workflow times out.

    🚫 BLOCK IP PERMANENTLY ✓ Ignore & Monitor

    Sent by n8n SOC Orchestration Workflow • DevSecOps Self-Healing Cloud

    `; return [{ json: { ...ctx, outlineDocId: docId, outlineDocUrl: outlineUrl, blockUrl, ignoreUrl, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `🚨 WAF Alert — ${ctx.attackerIp} | ${ctx.totalBlocked} blocked requests | Action Required`, } }];

nodes.name: Get WAF IP Set — Fetch Lock Token
Block IP — Update WAF IP Set

parameters.body:
={
  "id": "{{ $('Build HITL Email HTML').first().json.outlineDocId }}",
  "text": "# Security Incident Report

> **Status:** ✅ RESOLVED — IP Blocked

---

## Incident Summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Alarm** | `{{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.alarmName }}` |
| **Triggered** | {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.stateTime }} |
| **WAF Rule** | {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.ruleName }} |

---

## Attacker Profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source IP** | `{{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.attackerIp }}` |
| **Blocked Requests** | {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.totalBlocked }} |
| **Duration** | {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.attackDuration }} |

---

## Response

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Action Taken** | ✅ IP Permanently Blocked in AWS WAF IP Set |
| **WAF IP Set** | `{{ $vars.WAF_IP_SET_NAME }}` |
| **Blocked CIDR** | `{{ $('Merge Attacker IP into Blocklist').first().json.blockedIp }}` |
| **Total IPs in Blocklist** | {{ $('Merge Attacker IP into Blocklist').first().json.newCount }} |

---

*Resolved by admin via n8n HITL workflow*",
  "publish": true
}

parameters.subject: =✅ IP Blocked — {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.attackerIp }} added to WAF blocklist
parameters.html:
=

✅ IP Permanently Blocked

Blocked IP: {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.attackerIp }}/32

WAF IP Set: {{ $vars.WAF_IP_SET_NAME }}

Total IPs in blocklist: {{ $('Merge Attacker IP into Blocklist').first().json.newCount }}

Original blocked requests: {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.totalBlocked }}

📄 View Incident Report in Outline

n8n SOC Orchestration Workflow • DevSecOps Self-Healing Cloud

parameters.body:
={
  "id": "{{ $('Build HITL Email HTML').first().json.outlineDocId }}",
  "text": "# Security Incident Report

> **Status:** ⚪ CLOSED — False Positive / Monitoring

---

## Incident Summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Alarm** | `{{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.alarmName }}` |
| **Triggered** | {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.stateTime }} |
| **Source IP** | `{{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.attackerIp }}` |
| **Blocked Requests** | {{ $('Parse Splunk Attacker Data').first().json.totalBlocked }} |

---

## Response

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Action Taken** | ⚪ Ignored — Flagged for continued monitoring |
| **Rationale** | Admin reviewed and determined no permanent block required |

---

*Closed by admin via n8n HITL workflow — no WAF change made*",
  "publish": true
}

main.node: Get WAF IP Set — Fetch Lock Token
Block IP — Update WAF IP Set

_setup_instructions.description: n8n Variables to configure before activating (Settings → Variables)

variables.SPLUNK_URL: http://host.docker.internal:8089  (or http://splunk-devsecops:8089 if on shared Docker network)
variables.OUTLINE_COLLECTION_ID: Get from Outline: Settings → Collections → copy the UUID from the URL
